name: Western Silver Corporation
description: Western Silver Corporation was a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company primarily focused on silver and base metal properties. The company held significant interests in advanced mining projects located in Mexico and Canada, most notably the Peñasquito property in Zacatecas, Mexico. Throughout its operational history, Western Silver aimed to enhance shareholder value through the strategic acquisition, exploration, and development of high-potential mineral assets. The company was eventually acquired by Glamis Gold Ltd. in 2006, which was subsequently merged into Goldcorp Inc., marking the end of Western Silver's independent corporate existence in the mining sector.
